Header.tagline: Size 3 / 5 / 8 Metal, Resin, and Nylon Zippers

NotFound.message: Page not found. Redirecting to the homepage...

meta.title: Privacy Policy
meta.description: Privacy Policy for Weiwei Zipper. Learn how we collect, use, and protect your information.

overview.title: Overview
overview.paragraph1: {companyName} respects your privacy. This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal data.
overview.paragraph2: By using our website, you agree to the data practices described here.

informationWeCollect.title: Information We Collect
informationWeCollect.intro: We collect the following through inquiry forms and direct communications:

items.personal: Personal information — name, email, phone, company name, and job title
items.business: Business information — country, product needs, zipper type, size details, quantities, and delivery timelines
items.technical: Technical information — IP address, browser type, pages visited, and access time

informationWeCollect.outro: We only collect data necessary to provide our services.

howWeUse.title: How We Use Your Information
items: Respond to zipper inquiries and provide matching suggestions
Process and fulfill orders (sampling, production scheduling, shipping)
Provide after-sales support (repeat orders, replenishment, and issue follow-up)
Send order-related updates (shipping confirmations, delivery status)
Analyze website data to improve performance and content
Comply with applicable laws and regulations

cookies.title: Cookies and Tracking
cookies.paragraph1: We use cookies to improve your browsing experience. Cookies are small text files stored in your browser.

items.essential: Essential cookies — ensure basic site functions (e.g., language selection)
items.analytics: Analytics cookies — help us understand visitor behavior and improve experience

cookies.paragraph2: You can manage cookies in your browser settings, but disabling them may affect some features.

dataProtection.title: Data Protection
items: SSL/TLS encryption for data transmission
Restricted employee access to personal data
Regular review and update of security practices
dataProtection.outro: We never sell your data. We only share it with third parties when necessary (e.g., logistics partners for shipping), and require them to follow equivalent protection standards.

dataRetention.title: Data Retention
items: Inquiry and business records are kept for three years
Order records are retained per tax and commercial regulations
dataRetention.outro: You may request deletion at any time. We will process your request promptly, except where retention is required by law.

internationalTransfers.title: International Data Transfers
internationalTransfers.paragraph: As a global exporter, your data may be transferred between China and other countries. We ensure proper safeguards during all transfers. By submitting inquiries, you consent to such transfers.

thirdPartyLinks.title: Third-Party Links
thirdPartyLinks.paragraph: Our site may link to platforms like WhatsApp and WeChat. These have their own privacy policies, and we are not responsible for them. Review their policies before sharing personal data.

yourRights.title: Your Rights
yourRights.intro: Under applicable laws, you have the right to:
items: Access personal data we hold about you
Correct inaccurate or incomplete data
Request deletion of your data
Object to or restrict our data processing
Data portability

changes.title: Changes to This Policy
changes.paragraph: We may update this policy to reflect business changes or legal requirements. Updates will be posted here with a new date. We encourage periodic review.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.intro: For privacy-related questions, we respond within two business days.

meta.title: Terms of Service
meta.description: Terms of Service for Weiwei Zipper. Understand our website usage conditions, product information, intellectual property, and transaction terms.

acceptance.title: Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.paragraph2: By using this site, you agree to these terms. If you disagree, please stop using the site. We may update these terms at any time, effective upon posting.

termsOfUse.title: Terms of Use
termsOfUse.paragraph1: Website content is for information and business communication only. You may browse content and send inquiries.
items: Use the site for unlawful purposes
Attempt unauthorized access to our systems
Use automated tools to scrape content in bulk
Impair normal website operation in any way

productInfo.title: Product Information & Quotations
productInfo.paragraph: We strive for accuracy in product information. However, specs may change without notice due to ongoing improvements.
items: Product images are for reference only; the current pages focus on category and size communication
All quotes are preliminary; final pricing is per the signed contract or Proforma Invoice
Quotes are typically valid for 30 days unless otherwise stated in writing

orders.title: Orders & Transaction Terms
orders.paragraph: Website inquiries are not formal orders. Orders are established after both parties confirm specs, pricing, quantity, delivery, and payment terms.
orders.paymentTerms: Standard terms: 30% deposit after order confirmation, balance before shipment. Prices exclude bank charges.

shipping.title: Shipping & Delivery
shipping.paragraph: Delivery times start from order confirmation and deposit receipt.
leadTimes: Standard projects: confirmed according to the live production schedule
Sample and bulk timing depends on complexity
shipping.packaging: Packaging is arranged according to zipper type and quantity for both samples and bulk shipment.
shipping.forceMajeure: Delays from force majeure (natural disasters, regulations, logistics disruptions) are not considered breach of contract.

quality.title: Quality Assurance & Claims
quality.paragraph: All products follow the confirmed specifications, with focus on consistency across batches.
claims: Notify us in writing within 14 days of receipt
Provide defect description and photo evidence
After verification: replacement, supplementary shipment, or credit adjustment

intellectualProperty.title: Intellectual Property
intellectualProperty.paragraph: All website content (text, images, logos, code, etc.) is protected by Chinese and international IP laws.
items: Commercial use requires prior written permission
Personal reference downloads are permitted with copyright notices retained

liability.title: Limitation of Liability
liability.paragraph1: Website content is provided "as is" without warranties. We do not guarantee uninterrupted or error-free operation.
liability.paragraph2: Technical advice and recommendations are for reference only. Final zipper selection should be based on your actual project requirements. We are not liable for damages from website use.

governingLaw.title: Governing Law & Disputes
governingLaw.paragraph: These terms are governed by the laws of the People's Republic of China.
steps: If unresolved, submit to the competent court at the company's location
International trade disputes may go to CIETAC arbitration

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.intro: For questions about these terms, we respond within two business days.

ProductPage.quoteDescription: Submit your requirements through the Weiwei Zipper quote page
